name: Stash transaction flows

steps.condition: HN-F treats the Read request from RN-F1 as a ReadUnique , and sends a combined CompData to RN-F1.
RN-F1 sends CompAck to HN-F to complete the Read transaction.
The Request Node sends a StashOnceShared request to HN-F with the Stash target identified as
HN-F sends a Comp response after establishing processing order for the received request that is
the request is processed before a request to the same address received later from any Requester.
HN-F sends a SnpStashShared snoop to RN-F1, and a ReadNoSnp request to SN-F to fetch data.

completionCondition: Flow completes when the permitted message sequence is observed.
